api-gateway/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Refactored security configuration to use a fluent builder pattern and added new route definitions.
Added explicit CORS configuration with defaults to the security filter chain.
Extracted Swagger UI and aggregate paths into static final arrays for cleaner configuration.
Updated authorization rules to permit access to Swagger UI, aggregate endpoints, fallback, and actuator paths.
Added authentication requirements for new API endpoints related to categories, users, carts, orders, payments, and subscriptions.
Changed default authorization policy from permitAll to authenticated for any unmatched requests.
Moved CSRF disable configuration into the fluent builder chain instead of a separate statement.
Add import for CircuitBreakerFilterFunctions to support circuit breaker logic in routes.
Add import for HttpMethod to support HTTP method predicates in API docs routes.
Add import for HttpStatus to support status codes in fallback route.
Add import for UriComponentsBuilder to support URI rewriting in API docs routes.
Add import for java.net.URI to support URI creation for fallback.
Define a fallback URI field for circuit breaker configuration.
Rename developer service route bean and ID, and add circuit breaker filter.
Rename application service route bean and ID, and add circuit breaker filter.
Add new route for category service with circuit breaker.
Add new route for user service with circuit breaker.
Add new route for cart service with circuit breaker.
Add new route for order service with circuit breaker.
Add new route for payment service with circuit breaker.
Add new route for subscription service with circuit breaker.
Add new route for subscription plan service with circuit breaker.
Add helper method to rewrite request URI for API docs aggregation.
Add route for application service API docs with URI rewriting.
Add route for developer service API docs with URI rewriting.
Add route for user service API docs with URI rewriting.
Add route for cart service API docs with URI rewriting.
Add route for order service API docs with URI rewriting.
Add route for payment service API docs with URI rewriting.
Add route for subscription service API docs with URI rewriting.
Add fallback route to handle service unavailability.

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Rename the Feign client name from 'developer-service' to 'developerClient' to align with the new microservice naming convention.
Replace deprecated @RequestMapping with @GetMapping for cleaner REST endpoint definition.
Add Resilience4j CircuitBreaker annotation to handle failures gracefully.
Add Resilience4j Retry annotation to automatically retry failed requests.
Add Micrometer Observed annotation for observability and metrics collection.
Implement fallback method for isDeveloperById to return false on failure.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.after: default boolean isDeveloperByIdFallback(String id, Throwable throwable) { ... return false; }

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Add new endpoint to check developer existence by Keycloak ID.
Add Resilience4j CircuitBreaker annotation to the new Keycloak ID endpoint.
Add Resilience4j Retry annotation to the new Keycloak ID endpoint.
Add Micrometer Observed annotation to the new Keycloak ID endpoint for observability.
Implement fallback method for isDeveloperByKeycloakId to return false on failure.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.after: default boolean isDeveloperByKeycloakIdFallback(String keycloakUserId, Throwable throwable) { ... return false; }

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Add constant array for Swagger UI paths to centralize path configuration.
Refactor security filter chain by removing verbose logging and comments.
Refactor authorization rules to use centralized path constants and remove comments.
Refactor OAuth2 configuration by removing inline comments.
Remove commented-out code block for authentication success event listener.
Refactor multipart request handling to parse JSON strings manually instead of relying on Spring's automatic deserialization of complex objects within multipart parts.

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Add security constraint to restrict application creation to users with the 'developer' role.
Inject application configuration property for the upload directory path.
Inject ObjectMapper dependency to support manual JSON parsing in the controller.
Add new endpoint to retrieve applications owned by the currently authenticated developer.
Add new endpoint to serve static image resources (thumbnails/screenshots) from the file system.
Clean up debug logging statements (System.out.println) and comments in the controller.

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Add jakarta.validation.Valid import to support nested DTO validation annotations.
Add MonetizationType enum import to support the new monetizationType field in the record.
Add monetizationType field with @NotNull constraint to enforce monetization strategy selection.
Add offeredSubscriptionPlans field with @Valid annotation to support nested subscription plan validation.
Remove screenshots field from the request DTO, likely moving screenshot handling to a separate endpoint or service.
Remove thumbnailUrl field from the request DTO, likely moving thumbnail handling to a separate endpoint or service.
Remove averageRating field from the request DTO as ratings are typically calculated server-side, not provided in creation requests.
Remove ratingCount field from the request DTO as ratings are typically calculated server-side, not provided in creation requests.
Remove createdAt field from the request DTO as it should be managed by the server via @CreatedDate or similar mechanisms.
Remove updatedAt field from the request DTO as it should be managed by the server via @LastModifiedDate or similar mechanisms.
Add monetizationType field to the ApplicationResponse record.
Add associatedSubscriptionPlanIds field to the ApplicationResponse record.
Change developerId type from Long to String in the ApplicationResponse record.
